Uses group selectors for parent-child styling: `group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list` - Exports both components and variant CVA: `export { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, tabsListVariants }` **CVA structure:** ```typescript const tabsListVariants = cva(baseClasses, { variants: { variant: { default: "bg-muted", line: "gap-1 bg-transparent", }, }, defaultVariants: { variant: "default" }, }) ``` --- ### 3. **SIMPLE COMPOUND COMPONENT PATTERN (Accordion)** **File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775392552540-wfjfyx/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/accordion.tsx` **Key patterns:** - Thin wrapper around Radix-UI primitives - No custom context (Radix handles state internally) - Each component gets its own `data-slot` attribute - Minimal CSS applied in component files, mostly relies on data attributes - Prop typing: `React.ComponentProps` - Composition: AccordionTrigger wraps AccordionPrimitive.Header + AccordionPrimitive.Trigger --- ### 4. **SIMPLE STATELESS COMPONENTS (Button, Badge, Card)** **File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775392552540-wfjfyx/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/button.tsx` **Button pattern:** ```typescript function Button({ className, variant = "default", size = "default", asChild = false, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<"button"> & VariantProps & { asChild?: boolean }) ``` - Uses CVA for variants - Supports `asChild` prop via Radix `Slot.Root` - Data attributes for styling: `data-slot`, `data-variant`, `data-size` - Returns merges className with CVA result: `cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))` **Card pattern** (multi-part component): - Each part is a separate function: `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter`, `CardAction` - Each gets own `data-slot` attribute - All exported together --- ### 5. **MINIMAL RADIX-UI WRAPPER (Collapsible)** **File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775392552540-wfjfyx/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/collapsible.tsx` **Pattern:** - Virtually transparent wrappers around Radix-UI primitives - Only adds `data-slot` attribute - Spreads all props through - Useful for consistency and future extensibility --- ### 6. **UTILITIES (cn function)** **File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775392552540-wfjfyx/apps/v4/lib/utils.ts` ```typescript export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)) } ``` - Uses `clsx` for conditional classes - Uses `twMerge` to handle Tailwind conflicts (last value wins) - Used everywhere to merge CVA output with custom className --- ### 7. **REGISTRY STRUCTURE (UI Components)** **File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775392552540-wfjfyx/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/_registry.ts` **Carousel entry** (complex, has external dependencies): ```typescript { name: "carousel", type: "registry:ui", files: [ { path: "ui/carousel.tsx", type: "registry:ui", }, ], registryDependencies: ["button"], dependencies: ["embla-carousel-react"], } ``` **Tabs entry** (simple, Radix-based): ```typescript { name: "tabs", type: "registry:ui", dependencies: ["radix-ui"], files: [ { path: "ui/tabs.tsx", type: "registry:ui", }, ], } ``` **Accordion entry**: ```typescript { name: "accordion", type: "registry:ui", dependencies: ["radix-ui"], files: [ { path: "ui/accordion.tsx", type: "registry:ui", }, ], } ``` --- ### 8. **REGISTRY STRUCTURE (Examples)** **File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775392552540-wfjfyx/apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/examples/_registry.ts` **Simple demo entry**: ```typescript { name: "tabs-demo", type: "registry:example", registryDependencies: ["tabs"], files: [ { path: "examples/tabs-demo.tsx", type: "registry:example", }, ], } ``` **Carousel with multiple variants** (6 different examples): -
